## Security Checklist
- [ ] User-controlled input is escaped/sanitized before HTML rendering
- [ ] Dynamic URLs are validated/allowlisted before use
- [ ] No shell command string concatenation with untrusted values
- [ ] Workflow secrets exposure is minimized (no unnecessary broad secret passing)
- [ ] Added/updated dependencies were checked for known vulnerabilities
- [ ] Code scanning / Dependabot alerts are reviewed for this change
